queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Jabra Direct' AND publisher = 'GN Audio A/S';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Jabra Direct' AND publisher = 'GN Audio A/S' AND version_compare(version, '8.1.14601') < 0);

refs.66727e5a:
# Learn more about .exe install scripts:
# http://fleetdm.com/learn-more-about/exe-install-scripts

$exeFilePath = "${env:INSTALLER_PATH}"

try {

# WiX burn bundle: install silently for all users.
$processOptions = @{
  FilePath = "$exeFilePath"
  ArgumentList = "/quiet /norestart"
  PassThru = $true
  Wait = $true
}

# Start process and track exit code
$process = Start-Process @processOptions
$exitCode = $process.ExitCode

# Prints the exit code
Write-Host "Install exit code: $exitCode"
Exit $exitCode

} catch {
  Write-Host "Error: $_"
  Exit 1
}
